creator: admin@asu-vei.ru
text:
Created attachment 243502
Build log

While compiling in poudriere there's an error regarding ports versions:

===>  Staging for gitlab-ce-16.1.2
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===> Creating groups.
===> Creating users
cp -f /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/gitlab-ce/work/gitlab-foss-e60fc11f2d3d2a3d4fe6e1c9001e29091bd4ccd5/config/database.yml.postgresql /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/gitlab-ce/work/gitlab-foss-e60fc11f2d3d2a3d4fe6e1c9001e29091bd4ccd5/config/database.yml.sample
(cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/gitlab-ce/work/gitlab-foss-e60fc11f2d3d2a3d4fe6e1c9001e29091bd4ccd5 && /bin/rm -f Gemfile.lock && bundle install --local)
`/nonexistent` is not a directory.
Bundler will use `/tmp/bundler20230720-82767-ok3iyn82767' as your home directory temporarily.
Resolving dependencies...
Could not find compatible versions

Because every version of aws-sdk-cloudformation depends on aws-sdk-core >=
3.177.0, < 4.A
  and Gemfile depends on aws-sdk-core ~> 3.175.0,
  aws-sdk-cloudformation cannot be used.
So, because Gemfile depends on aws-sdk-cloudformation ~> 1,
  version solving has failed.
*** Error code 6

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/gitlab-ce
=>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for gitlab-ce-16.1.2
build of www/gitlab-ce | gitlab-ce-16.1.2 ended at Thu Jul 20 14:56:54 MSK 2023
build time: 00:01:25
!!! build failure encountered !!!

Full log is attached.

Thanks!
